c.question: How could the gas seperation be solved for these specific gas flows?
c.answer: c	The flow of nitrogen in the gas shield can be greatly increased.

d.question: Will there be continuous etching if the shown conditions are used?
d.answer: d	It is likely that there will be continuous etching, even though the mole fractions of TMA and HF in their designated locations are way larger.

b.question: Which gas shows more diffusion into a different region?
b.answer: b	TMA has a higher mole fraction in the HF region as compared to HF in the TMA region. So TMA diffuses more into the other region.
